Defendants Bank Of America And Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'S Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Ekaterina Berman of Law Offices of Ekaterina Berman (408-483-3012) appear for plaintiffs Jun Lara and Maria Lidia Medrano De Lara opposint party.
Atty. Sharon Stewart of Bryan Cave LLP (415-675-3400) appear for defendant Bank of America N.A. and Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.

Discussion, tentative rulign is modified, Defendants Bank Of America And Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s Demurrer To Complaint is OVERRULED in part and SUSTAINED in part. Demurrer is SUSTAINED with LEAVE TO AMEND in good faith 14th cause of action for violation of Security First Rule; 15th cause of action to allege tender and to verify complaint; as to 7th cause of action for violation of Rosenthal Act. leave it blank for the court's determination. See Franczak v. Suntrust Mortgage 2013 WL 843912; OVERRULED as to all other causes of action, sufficiently alleged. Plaintiff to prepare order. Judge Ronald E Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)
